CustomField.formula: Case(text(COMPELLING_REASON_TO_ACT_CRTA__c),'1','1. Action tied to a specific initiative, pain or goal','0','0. No compelling reason to act identified','2','2. Sponsor shared a specific date for action','3','3. Documented CRTA agreed upon by Sponsor','4','4. Power shared a specific date for action','5','5. Documented CRTA agreed upon by Power','null')
CustomField.label: CRTA Data grouping
